'''doyasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbishly|rubbishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbishly|rubbishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doyasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyasithi|doyasithi]] || [[word:doyasiji|doyasiji]] || [[word:doyasishi|doyasishi]] || [[word:doyasiki|doyasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyasuthuthu|doyasuthuthu]] || [[word:doyasujuju|doyasujuju]] || [[word:doyasushushu|doyasushushu]] || [[word:doyasukuku|doyasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyasuthu|doyasuthu]] || [[word:doyasuju|doyasuju]] || [[word:doyasushu|doyasushu]] || [[word:doyasuku|doyasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyasufthuf|doyasufthuf]] || [[word:doyasufjuf|doyasufjuf]] || [[word:doyasufshuf|doyasufshuf]] || [[word:doyasufkuf|doyasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyasethe|doyasethe]] || [[word:doyaseje|doyaseje]] || [[word:doyaseshe|doyaseshe]] || [[word:doyaseke|doyaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyasothotho|doyasothotho]] || [[word:doyasojojo|doyasojojo]] || [[word:doyasoshosho|doyasoshosho]] || [[word:doyasokoko|doyasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyasotho|doyasotho]] || [[word:doyasojo|doyasojo]] || [[word:doyasosho|doyasosho]] || [[word:doyasoko|doyasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyasofthof|doyasofthof]] || [[word:doyasofjof|doyasofjof]] || [[word:doyasofshof|doyasofshof]] || [[word:doyasofkof|doyasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyas챦fth챦f|doyas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fj챦f|doyas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fsh챦f|doyas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fk챦f|doyas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyas챦fth챦fth챦f|doyas챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fj챦fj챦f|doyas챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fsh챦fsh챦f|doyas챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fk챦fk챦f|doyas챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyas챦fth챦f|doyas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fj챦f|doyas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fsh챦f|doyas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fk챦f|doyas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyas챦fth챦f|doyas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fj챦f|doyas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fsh챦f|doyas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:doyas챦fk챦f|doyas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyas챈th챈|doyas챈th챈]] || [[word:doyas챈j챈|doyas챈j챈]] || [[word:doyas챈sh챈|doyas챈sh챈]] || [[word:doyas챈k챈|doyas챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyasathatha|doyasathatha]] || [[word:doyasajaja|doyasajaja]] || [[word:doyasashasha|doyasashasha]] || [[word:doyasakaka|doyasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyasatha|doyasatha]] || [[word:doyasaja|doyasaja]] || [[word:doyasasha|doyasasha]] || [[word:doyasaka|doyasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyasafthaf|doyasafthaf]] || [[word:doyasafjaf|doyasafjaf]] || [[word:doyasafshaf|doyasafshaf]] || [[word:doyasafkaf|doyasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:doyasasha|doyasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyash챘sha|doyash챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyasrosha|doyasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyasmusha|doyasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyasyasha|doyasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyasnksh챘sha|godoyasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyasnkrosha|godoyasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyasnkmusha|godoyasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyasnkyasha|godoyasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:doyayasasha|doyayasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyayash챘sha|doyayash챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyayasrosha|doyayasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyayasmusha|doyayasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyayasyasha|doyayasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyayasnksh챘sha|godoyayasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyayasnkrosha|godoyayasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyayasnkmusha|godoyayasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyayasnkyasha|godoyayasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dey챈sasha|dey챈sasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dey챈sh챘sha|dey챈sh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dey챈srosha|dey챈srosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dey챈smusha|dey챈smusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dey챈syasha|dey챈syasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godey챈snksh챘sha|godey챈snksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godey챈snkrosha|godey챈snkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godey챈snkmusha|godey챈snkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godey챈snkyasha|godey챈snkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:doyfasasha|doyfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyfash챘sha|doyfash챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyfasrosha|doyfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyfasmusha|doyfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyfasyasha|doyfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyfasnksh챘sha|godoyfasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyfasnkrosha|godoyfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyfasnkmusha|godoyfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyfasnkyasha|godoyfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
